sizing_rule.note: Position size derived from optimal f calculation based on worst-case P&L (W) and associated probability (P) from historical trade distribution. f is mathematically optimal fraction of capital to risk per trade. Requires analysis of historical trade results before position sizing.

source_rule_text: Position size should be determined by optimal f, calculated from the worst-case P&L and probability distribution of historical trades, rather than blindly entering at arbitrary times.
